conbody.p: Overview: The Assistant Usage report helps to analyze the accuracy of CLU suggested codes.

This report displays the following information:
Count of accepted, rejected, hidden, and no action CLU codes by each CDS for a selected date range
Count of total accepted, rejected, hidden, and no action CLU codes for a selected date range
Code count for the encounters with Initial Review Date are only displayed in this report.
ELX Codes and their counts of accepted, removed and no action are now displayed in this report.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE Triage CDE Triage Dashboard Assistant Usage .

This Assistant Usage displays the following:
Assistant Usage by CDS Chart
Assistant Usage by Category Chart
Code Count Chart
Encounter details tabular Chart
For filters on all pages, refer .

p.b: Assistant Usage - Assistant Usage by CDS

ul.li: In the Assistant Usage By CDS section, X-axis indicates the count of accepted, rejected, hidden and no action CLU codes, and Y-axis indicates the name of the CDS assigned to the encounter in CDS Triage.
Encounters that do not have any CDS assigned are displayed under the Unassigned CDS category on the Y-axis.

p.b: Assistant Usage - Assistant Usage by Category

ul.li: In the Assistant Usage by Category section, the donut chart displays the total count of the accepted, rejected, hidden and no action CLU codes.
Tooltip displays count of code for each category (accepted and no action CLU codes) and the total suggested code.
In the Code Count section, the chart by default displays the count of each rejected codes by default.
This chart allows you to view the data for accepted, hidden, and ignored CLU codes. Tooltip displays the rejected codes as % of total rejected.
